stamp.workspace_role: Umbrella workspace over CascadeProjects (hogsmade submodule) with nested GRID; operator overlay (planes, gates, racks, bridges).
composition_arc: Fourfold + nearest neighborhood: LICENSE, DESIGN.md, Makefile, INSTRUCTION.md; hub REFERENCE.md; FOURFOLD_NEIGHBORHOOD (voices: prince, hermes, caraxes; GRID windows; Pi).
Partition framing: git modules/submodules vs directories; voices as routing lenses.
Sixteenfold: 4 strata × 4 archetypes (covenant, cartography, circuit, cadence).
Eightfold compaction + DRY/WET gain staging + swing metrics vs gesture (COMPOSITION_EIGHTFOLD_GAIN).

brand_voice.summary: Navigational infrastructure prose: name the fold and stratum before acting; prefer one hub hop (REFERENCE) over scattered restatement; mix ~two-thirds canonical DRY with ~one-third contextual WET so procedure stays repeatable without erasing session truth.

tone.cadence: Complete sentences; tables and graphs for scan; metaphors are structural (signal chain, hops), not promotional.
avoid: ungated agent output as sole source of truth
scope bleed across GRID debugging windows
duplicating policy in wet notes instead of linking DRY anchors

registers.when_to_use: Default build and implementation path across the Mangrove/Cascade stack; Makefile, npm gates, scripts/bridges when shipping glue.
Submodule pointers, cross-repo alignment, CONTRIBUTING flows between umbrella and hogsmade; cadence that touches two remotes.
Marketplace and plugin scouting; peripheral integration surfaces.
GRID-main only: pick one of Python / frontend / Electron / landing; narrow gate before widening.
SPEC, CENTRAL_PLAZA, planes/, WORKSPACE_GATES, elevator, racks — navigation and reconcile laps without editing nested product code.

dry_wet_mix.note: Target band from COMPOSITION_EIGHTFOLD_GAIN: canonical tables and root fourfold as DRY spine; review-package and lap notes as bounded WET.

four_on_the_floor.reserved_pct_note: ~8%: submodule drift, local env, wet review bundles, per-host plane checks — expected; does not invalidate the floor.

prompts_for_voice_check: Which octant (O1–O8) is this change in, and does the register match (prince vs hermes vs grid-window)?
Can a reader reach the canonical anchor from REFERENCE.md in three hops or fewer?
Does this sentence add DRY spine or only WET context — if only wet, is it linked to a DRY anchor?
If gesture says 'submodule bump' but files edited are GRID-only, how should scope be reframed?
next_artifacts: Optional: generate CHARACTERS.md from registers + octants for narrative onboarding.
Optional: Cursor canvas or MCP tool that loads session-seal.json for fold-aware prompts.
Optional: CI check that session-seal.json validates against schemas/session-seal-v1.schema.json when docs/artifacts/ changes.
